urdu transliteration text:
Woh kya fatmi hai
Woh kya matmi hai
Neither a FatemiNor a Matami
Joh Maula Ali ki wila chorta hai
english translation text: Is one who abandons the wila of Ali

urdu transliteration text:
Nahi baat meri, hadees e nabi hai
Ali ko faqad behaya chorta hai
english translation text: Take it not from me, but from the Hadeeth of the NabiOnly a shameless person abandons Ali

urdu transliteration text:
Wilayat adhuri, sharafat adhuri
Ali ke bina hai, ibadat adhuri
english translation text: If (the belief in) Wilayat is incomplete, nobility is incomplete. Without Ali, all worship is incomplete.

urdu transliteration text:
Abhi manglo tum, wilayat se maafi
Ali taubah ka dar khula chorta hai
english translation text: Seek penance from the WaliFor Ali keeps open the doorway of repentance
